DATA-PIPE-01.desc: materializeAgenticDataPipeline builds raw, staging, semantic, and lineage layers from billing and telemetry inputs

DATA-PIPE-02.desc: pipeline reruns are idempotent and downgrade to noop when source hashes do not change

DATA-PIPE-03.desc: reconciliation flags unreconciled paid events and telemetry coverage drift as warnings

DATA-PIPE-04.desc: schedule manager emits a managed async-job spec for automated pipeline materialization

DATA-PIPE-05.desc: semantic-layer consumes the staged pipeline and surfaces pipeline quality metrics

DATA-PIPE-06.desc: verify-run full includes the data-pipeline proof lane and artifact
